LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descr: Cover the engine with extended armor plating, protecting it from gunfire.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Engine Cover
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descr: Reinforce the front bumper to allow this vehicle to deal more damage during collisions.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Reinforced Bumper
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.desc: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descr: Extend the cabin by adding space for an additional passenger.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Larger Cabin
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descr: Replace the tires with deep treaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Off Road Tires
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descr: Improve the turret with more efficient firing mechanism and ammo feeding system, allowing it to fire more rapidly and with higher accuracy. Additionally, install smokepop canisters on a turret, allowing the vehicle to eject a smoke screen.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Improved Turret
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descr: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Cargo Capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descr: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descr: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descr: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descr: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Highwayman_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Fuel Consumption
